message:
fix(core): fix convergence bugs in crdt, self_stabilize, persistent_ds

- crdt: align LwwRegister::set tiebreaker to use > (not >=) matching merge semantics
- self_stabilize: reset peer_root on start() to prevent stale state on session reuse
- self_stabilize: collapse identical is_authority branches in handle_root_hash
- self_stabilize: fix non-authority handle_patch to detect full-state dumps and remove surplus local keys
- persistent_ds: add debug_assert for monotonic timestamps in VersionedStore::push

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
